title: Enthaaraa Enthaaraa Lyrics Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Enthaaraa Enthaaraa
Singers: Shadab Faridi, Chinmayi
Music: M.Ghibran
Movie: Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah
Lyrics: Karthik Netha

Enthaaaraa enthaaraa neeye en thaaraa
enmanam poothadhey thaaraa..
kanpooraa kanpooraa neeye thaan thaaraa
kannaaraak kaangiren thaaraa.

Thanneerai poosikondu mella chellum
pinbangal nee aaggiraai, adhire,,
ennodu kadhal vandhu, enna solla
yekkangal pesudhey.

Unthaara unthaara naaney un thaaraa.
en vaanam pothadhey seeraa..
kanpooraa kanpooraa neeye than veeraa.
en paarvai aandhey kooraaa..

Kanneerai poosikondu mella chellum
pinbangal nee aaggiraai, adhire,,
ennodu kadhal vandhu, enna solla
vekkangal pesudhey.

Yeno indru yeno
naan undhan naano...
neeya illai naaanaaa..
naam ennum naamo..

Thoondilaaa nee oonjalaa
thooralaa nee kaanalaaa
kaththeegam mounam nee kondu vandhaai
illaadhal oru, illaadha peril
nam kadhal vazhumey
hoi .. nam kadhal vazhumey..

un dhisaigalalai padapadavena thandhaai
minminigalai un vizhigalai kondaai
kanimigalil un iravainai
katha kathapudan thandhaai
kannaviley nizhavoli thandhaai.

Bramanda kaalam nee thandhu sendraai
ennaatkal theerndhadhey..

Enthaaaraa enthaaraa neeye en thaaraa
enmanam poothadhey thaaraa..
kanpooraa kanpooraa neeye thaan thaaraa
kannaaraak kaangiren thaaraa.

Thanneerai poosikondu mella chellum
pinbangal nee aaggiraai, adhire,,
ennodu kadhal vandhu, enna solla
yekkangal pesudhey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enthaaraa Enthaaraa?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah?

The movie revolves around the themes of love and marriage, exploring the dynamics between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and Shadab Faridi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Enthaaraa Enthaaraa was composed by M Ghibran.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 2, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enthaaraa Enthaaraa, the protagonists express their deep affection for each other through heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and connection, making it a standout piece in the movie Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah. As the characters navigate their romantic journey, this duet serves as a poignant reminder of the joys and challenges of love. The soothing melodies and captivating voices evoke a sense of warmth and nostalgia, perfect for any romantic occasion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Enthaaraa Enthaaraa from the movie Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah, where the soulful voices of Chinmayi and Shadab Faridi blend beautifully with M Ghibran's mesmerizing composition. This romantic duet captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to your playlist. Dive into the lyrical beauty crafted by Karthik Netha that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: You are my everything, my heart blooms because of you. I see you, I see you, you are the one I am looking at with love.
With the water flowing gently, you are becoming my future. Oh, my love has come, what should I say, it speaks to me.
You are my everything, my sky is shining because of you. I see you, I see you, you are my beloved. My gaze is fixed on you.
With tears flowing gently, you are becoming my future. Oh, my love has come, what should I say, it speaks to me.
Today feels different, I am you and you are me... if you are not me, then who are we... we are always us.
You are not just a dream, you are not just a thought. Without you, our love would not exist, our love would live on.
You have given me directions, you have brought light to my eyes. In the stories of my nights, you have given me dreams and made them real.
You have given me the time of the universe, and it has resolved my past.
In your embrace, our love blooms and our struggles will be resolved.
You are my everything, my heart blooms because of you. I see you, I see you, you are the one I am looking at with love.
With the water flowing gently, you are becoming my future. Oh, my love has come, what should I say, it speaks to me.
